CustomField.inlineHelpText: Company for Case communications. End Users should be included as Customers.

filterItems.value: Customer, CTM Customer,CTBR Customer, CTBR Dealer

NAOCAP Aftermarket Part, NAOCAP Core Return, CTBR Parts T&T, CTBR Unit Sales, CTBR Finance, CTBR Logistica, CTBR IT, CTBR Container, CTBR Lynx Fleet, CTBR Warranty, CTBR Warehouse GO, CTBR Warehouse RS
